시편 51:1.content: Have mercy on me, God, according to your loving kindness. According to the multitude of your tender mercies, blot out my transgressions.

시편 51:2.content: Wash me thoroughly from my iniquity. Cleanse me from my sin.

시편 51:3.content: For I know my transgressions. My sin is constantly before me.

시편 51:4.content: Against you, and you only, I have sinned, and done that which is evil in your sight, so you may be proved right when you speak, and justified when you judge.

시편 51:5.content: Behold, I was born in iniquity. My mother conceived me in sin.

시편 51:6.content: Behold, you desire truth in the inward parts. You teach me wisdom in the inmost place.

시편 51:7.content: Purify me with hyssop, and I will be clean. Wash me, and I will be whiter than snow.

시편 51:8.content: Let me hear joy and gladness, that the bones which you have broken may rejoice.

시편 51:9.content: Hide your face from my sins, and blot out all of my iniquities.

시편 51:10.content: Create in me a clean heart, O God. Renew a right spirit within me.

시편 51:11.content: Don’t throw me from your presence, and don’t take your Holy Spirit from me.

시편 51:12.content: Restore to me the joy of your salvation. Uphold me with a willing spirit.

시편 51:13.content: Then I will teach transgressors your ways. Sinners will be converted to you.

시편 51:14.content: Deliver me from the guilt of bloodshed, O God, the God of my salvation. My tongue will sing aloud of your righteousness.

시편 51:15.content: Lord, open my lips. My mouth will declare your praise.

시편 51:16.content: For you don’t delight in sacrifice, or else I would give it. You have no pleasure in burnt offering.

시편 51:17.content: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit. O God, you will not despise a broken and contrite heart.

시편 51:18.content: Do well in your good pleasure to Zion. Build the walls of Jerusalem.

시편 51:19.content: Then you will delight in the sacrifices of righteousness, in burnt offerings and in whole burnt offerings. Then they will offer bulls on your altar.
